subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who warbleth with utterance, Who standeth alone in His beneficence, and Who hath chosen man to sing His praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تغرد بالبیان و توحد بالاحسان و اختار الانسان لثنائه بین
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
